title: Emergency Wedding
writer: Dalton Trumbo, Nat Perrin, Claude Binyon
actors: Larry Parks, Barbara Hale, Willard Parker
plot: In this remake of 1941's "You Belong to Me," a young millionaire, Peter J. Kirk, Jr., fails in all of his attempts to emulate his successful father. He meets and marries Dr. Helen Hunt, who refuses to give up her profession, which...
